name: smart
description: SMART is an efficient soft-tool that bridge the gap between Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) and real-world application. More details can be found in our paper: Advancing MAPF towards the Real World: A Scalable Multi-Agent Realistic Testbed (SMART) [1].
description_ja: SMARTは、Multi-Agent Path Finding（MAPF）と実世界応用のギャップを埋める効率的なソフトツール。詳細は論文「Advancing MAPF towards the Real World: A Scalable Multi-Agent Realistic Testbed（SMART）」を参照。
